hero.title: LEGO® EDUCATION INSPIRES LEARNING YOU CAN BUILD ON
hero.body: Learning solutions designed to empower students and teachers, build deeper understanding and engagement, and ignite a life-long love of learning.

limitless.title: UNLOCK LIMITLESS POTENTIAL
limitless.subtitle: Meaningful learning, extraordinary engagement, and the resources and support to ensure success.
limitless.card1Desc: LEGO-based activities that make complex STEAM concepts accessible and fun for children of all ages.
limitless.card2Desc: Kids design, build, and code robots using LEGO WeDo 2.0, developing engineering and programming skills hands-on.
limitless.card3Desc: Team-based challenges that develop communication, problem-solving, and critical thinking skills through building together.
limitless.card4Desc: Standards-aligned lesson plans designed by LEGO Education experts, ensuring quality learning outcomes for every student.

about.title: Together, We Can Transform Education
about.body: By inviting joy and curiosity into the classroom, we can enable all students and educators to thrive, developing the skills needed to build a better world for themselves and for others.

about1.title: LEGO WEDO 2.0
about1.body: Adobe Illustrator · Adobe Photoshop · Logo and brand identity creation

legoWedo.title: WHY PARTICIPATE IN THE LEGO WEDO 2.0 COURSE?
legoWedo.body: If you have a passion for drawing and sketching, or are intrigued by the world of design, you can begin your journey of acquiring exciting expertise through this course. This is an online course so you can join us wherever you are.
legoWedo.subtitle: The online Graphic Design Course offers a range of advantages:
legoWedo.li1: Online format lets you join the course from any location. No need to spend time on transport.
legoWedo.li2: You will learn to collaborate with printing houses during the course. For this purpose, we will visit a printing house to get familiar with the working processes at the place.
legoWedo.li3: By the end of the main part of the course, you will have an additional month to work with your trainer remotely to create and polish your portfolio.
legoWedo.li4: After completing the course, you will be ready to apply for Junior Graphic Designer positions.
legoWedo.creatingTitle: During the course, we focus on developing a deep understanding of creative processes, color theory, styles, and composition. We will delve into the art of creating:
legoWedo.printed: Printed materials such as brochures and flyers
legoWedo.conclusion: By the end of the course, you will have generated your initial portfolio pieces, positioning you to seek out roles as a Junior Graphic Designer.

testimonials.title: LOVED BY PARENTS
testimonials.t1Quote: LEGO Education has changed the way I feel about teaching tremendously. (...) When I introduced the LEGO bricks, all of a sudden, a lot of lights turned on in the classroom. (...)
testimonials.t1Role: Teacher, formerly from Columbia County Georgia
testimonials.t2Quote: (...) Two of the skills that I think are super important to have in the real world are critical thinking and problem solving. Both of those skills are fostered quite easily through LEGO Education.
testimonials.t3Quote: The courses are fantastic! My child has learned so much and has developed a real passion for building and problem-solving.
